title: Smoky Crumbl Asparagus Frittata
description: A tasty and healthy breakfast dish featuring smoky crumbl, asparagus, and a hint of Algerian spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add asparagus and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, Algerian spices, salt, and pepper.
Add cooked asparagus and smoky crumbl to the egg mixture. Stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the eggs are set.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with shredded cheese (if using).
Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
